synthesis.driver: U.S.-Iran clashes and Hormuz blockade fears are driving Brent up, but oversupply caps further gains.
synthesis.based_on: Trump proposes fee on Strait of Hormuz cargo shipments

takes.trump proposes fee on strait of hormuz c: Trump's fee proposal risks higher transit costs, slightly supporting oil prices upward.
takes.gold holds decline on renewed hormuz blo: Renewed blockade risks push war premium higher despite soft demand and supply glut.
takes.iran war strait of hormuz blockade retur: Strait closure escalates war premium, driving oil prices up despite oversupply.
takes.trump says us will take over the strait: U.S. toll proposal adds geopolitical tension, mildly supporting upward price pressure.
takes.live updates us resumes strikes while ua: Missile strikes on tankers escalate Hormuz risk, sharply boosting war premium and prices.
